response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years of broad experience across web, embedded, and open-source projects, including a self-founded GIS platform demonstrating architecture ownership and Linux familiarity. However, the role explicitly requires German at C1 level, and the candidate self-reports only Basic German — a hard blocker for a client-facing leadership role in a German-speaking market. Formal team-leadership and people-management experience also appears limited compared to what a Head of Development position demands.
strengths: Extensive polyglot development experience with strong open-source and Linux background
Founded and runs GISCollective, showing architecture, Kubernetes, and end-to-end ownership
Track record of mentoring via workshops, courses, and TDD/craftsmanship advocacy
concerns: German listed as Basic — falls well short of required C1 proficiency
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal team-lead role with direct reports
Limited evidence of UML modeling and formal requirements-management practice

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and open-source leadership
Lack of formal leadership/management track record
